title: BizObs Fix-It Agent — Autonomous Remediation
description: Davis problem → gather DQL context → query Davis root cause → call Fix-It Agent → verify remediation → send BizEvent summary

get_problem_details.name: get_problem_details
get_problem_details.description: Extract Davis problem context and query DQL for recent errors, affected services and business impact

get_davis_root_cause.name: get_davis_root_cause
get_davis_root_cause.description: Use Davis AI to analyse the root cause — queries the Problems API v2 for Davis evidence, impact analysis and root cause entity

trigger_fixit_agent.name: trigger_fixit_agent
trigger_fixit_agent.description: Call the BizObs Fix-It Agent webhook — sends full Davis context for AI-powered diagnosis and autonomous remediation

verify_remediation.name: verify_remediation
verify_remediation.description: Verify the Fix-It agent result — check if the Davis problem resolved, log the outcome, send a BizEvent for remediation tracking
